rationale: The cited paper (10.1509/jmkr.47.6.1070) studies uncertain promotions and finds an optimism-based effect with probability-consideration boundary conditions, which closely matches the citing paper’s central mechanism that variable (uncertain) exchange rates increase optimism and change redemption behavior. Given this direct theory/mechanism overlap (and a confirmed DOI match), this is not an obvious incidental mention and should be retained for second-stage judgment.
